title: phyllanthus selbyi
intro: Phyllanthus selbyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Selby's gooseberry or dwarf green gooseberry. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-viral effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus selbyi include its potential to reduce fever, treat liver and kidney disorders, and aid in the management of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
